fields.name: noticeId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the transaction hold notice

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Timestamp when the transaction hold was issued

fields.name: department
fields.description: Department that originated the transaction hold notice

fields.name: recipientDepartment
fields.description: Department receiving the transaction hold notice

fields.name: noticeType
fields.description: Type of transaction hold notice (e.g. TRANSACTION_HOLD)

fields.name: severity
fields.description: Severity level of the transaction hold notice (e.g. HIGH)

fields.name: accountNumber
fields.description: Account number associated with the transaction hold notice

fields.name: customerId
fields.description: Customer ID associated with the transaction hold notice

fields.name: customerName
fields.description: Full name of the customer associated with the transaction hold notice

fields.name: holdReason
fields.description: Reason for holding the transaction (e.g. suspicious transaction pattern detected)

fields.name: holdEffectiveDate
fields.description: Date when the transaction hold becomes effective

fields.name: estimatedHoldDuration
fields.description: Estimated duration of the transaction hold (e.g. 5 business days)

fields.name: transactionsAffected
fields.description: List of transactions affected by the transaction hold notice

children.name: transactionId
children.description: Unique identifier for each affected transaction

children.name: destinationCountry
children.description: Destination country of the affected transaction

children.name: status
children.description: Status of the affected transaction (e.g. HELD)

fields.name: riskScore
fields.description: Risk score associated with the transaction hold notice

fields.name: riskFlags
fields.description: List of risk flags associated with the transaction hold notice

fields.name: requiredActions
fields.description: List of required actions for the transaction hold notice
enum_values: Verify customer identity and business purpose
Escalate to compliance officer for final approval

fields.name: escalationLevel
fields.description: Escalation level associated with the transaction hold notice

fields.name: approvalRequired
fields.description: Indicates whether approval is required for the transaction hold notice

fields.name: approverRole
fields.description: Role of the approver required for the transaction hold notice

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Additional notes or comments for the transaction hold notice

fields.name: expiryDate
fields.description: Date when the transaction hold expires

fields.name: issuedBy
fields.description: System or entity that issued the transaction hold notice

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Priority level of the transaction hold notice (e.g. URGENT)
